application.name: Smokey Men Catering
application.purpose: Seasonal catering, package, menu, and costing management for Smokey Men Catering.
current_product_shape: Public catering packages overview and package detail pages
Costing model with package and seasonal variance tables

current_frontend_contract.navigation: Header page switch state plus package detail selection; no router yet
shared_components_expected: UI primitives: Card, Badge, Btn, Modal, FormField, SectionLabel, MetricCard, Toast, useConfirm
notes: Packages page now uses sales-led copy and reduced image dominance while preserving the warm editorial visual system.

design_guardrails.visual_language: warm editorial hospitality dashboard, low-noise cards, seasonal accent colours, thin borders, restrained shadows
design_guardrails.rule: Do not replace the visual system unless the operator explicitly asks. Add components using existing CSS variables and visual rhythm.

known_gaps: Persistence is not yet implemented; backend mutates in-memory db.
Uploaded file set references UI.jsx primitives but UI.jsx was not included in the upload; confirm it exists in repo before building.
No automated tests were supplied yet.
No package.json/vite config were supplied in this upload.
Packages are currently frontend-driven from packagesData.js and not yet backed by API persistence.
Recent package hero/card image sizing was adjusted in frontend/src/styles/packages.css; preserve editorial image proportions in future UI patches.

llm_build_policy.preferred_patch_method: bounded Python heredoc from repo root, or PowerShell file writer on Windows
hard_no: adding persistence/auth without a proposal note

minimum_before_commit: npm run build or npm --prefix frontend run build
node --check backend entry if backend exists
manual_review: visual style still matches current app

notes: Application identity renamed to Smokey Men Catering before initial Git baseline.

git.baseline_status: Initial GitHub baseline pushed; packages page sales polish included.
